overall.description: Gameplay footage from a third-person perspective showing a character running along a rural roadside at night, crossing a lit metal truss bridge over water, and continuing along a dirt path. The scene features passing vehicles and transitions from open roadside to enclosed bridge structure to lakeside trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural highway roadside with dirt shoulder

events.description: ATV with headlights on passes by on the asphalt road
car passes by on the road heading in the same direction

agents.ego_description: running along the dirt shoulder of a rural road toward a lit metal bridge in the distance

notable_agents.action: ATV driving past with headlights illuminating the road

entered.detail: large white metal truss bridge with overhead lights spanning across the water ahead
paved two-lane road with vehicle traffic
wooden bollards lining the edge of the dirt shoulder
dark shrubs and vegetation along the roadside
dense pine trees covering the hillside in the background

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a dirt shoulder beside a rural highway at night, approaching a lit metal truss bridge in the distance. An ATV and car pass by on the adjacent asphalt road. The environment is open with forested hills visible under a clear night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: metal truss bridge with overhead lighting

events.description: entering the covered metal truss bridge structure from the open roadside
motorcycle passes by on the bridge deck heading in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: running across the metal grate deck of the truss bridge, passing under overhead lights

notable_agents.action: person walking toward the camera on the bridge deck

entered.detail: fluorescent lights mounted on the bridge truss illuminating the deck
ribbed metal flooring of the bridge with visible grid pattern
white metal guardrails along the sides of the bridge

segments.scene_description: The character enters the enclosed metal truss bridge, running across the illuminated metal grate deck. The structure blocks most of the sky, with artificial overhead lights providing illumination. Another pedestrian walks toward the camera from the far end of the bridge, and a motorcycle passes by in the opposite lane.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky lakeside trail alongside forested water

events.description: exiting the bridge onto dirt path alongside the water
truck and car visible on the adjacent road with headlights on

agents.ego_description: running along the rocky dirt path at the water's edge, moving away from the bridge

entered.detail: dark calm water of the lake or river alongside the path
rocky and dirt terrain forming a trail at the water's edge
paved road running parallel to the dirt path

segments.scene_description: The character exits the bridge onto a dirt path running alongside a dark lake or river. The scene opens up to the night sky with forested hills visible across the water. Vehicles pass by on the parallel asphalt road to the left as the character continues along the rocky shoreline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open rural highway into the enclosed structure of a bridge before emerging onto a dark lakeside trail. It begins with the character running along a dirt shoulder under a clear night sky, passing an ATV and a car as a lit metal truss bridge looms in the distance. As the character enters the bridge, the open landscape is replaced by an illuminated metal grate deck and overhead lights, where a motorcycle and another pedestrian pass by within the confined structure. The scene then opens up again as the character exits the bridge, shifting from the artificial glow of the truss to the natural darkness of a rocky shoreline. Finally, the camera follows the path alongside a dark lake with forested hills visible across the water while vehicles continue to pass on the parallel asphalt road.
